items.why: The /audit skill explicitly calls `node scripts/sample-codebase.mjs --max-tokens 30000 --json`, and recent audits repeatedly logged that the helper is absent. That absence forces agents into ad hoc sampling and makes audit evidence less reproducible.
evidence: scripts/sample-codebase.mjs is absent in the live tree.
docs/AUDIT_2026-07-04_SESSION41.md records the missing sampler fallback.
The local /audit skill execution failed with MODULE_NOT_FOUND for scripts/sample-codebase.mjs.
items.recipe: Add a deterministic, Windows-safe sampler that honors --max-tokens and --json, skips heavy/generated directories, ranks core app/runtime/test/studio files first, and emits enough metadata for an agent to prove what was sampled.

items.why: The startup brief instructs agents to run `node scripts/ops.mjs genius-list`, but the command currently says no local generator is configured even though `scripts/cache-genius-list.mjs` exists and is the current source-of-truth bridge over the latest audit.
evidence: node scripts/ops.mjs genius-list prints a no-generator message.
scripts/cache-genius-list.mjs can write/read `.cache/genius-list.json` from the latest audit and TASK_BOARD truth.
test/studio-protocol-smoke.test.js already covers cache-genius-list but not the advertised ops genius-list command.
items.recipe: Route `ops genius-list` through `cache-genius-list --write`, then print the resulting cache summary and JSON so `/start` and `/go` receive actionable, truthful ranked work or an exhausted signal.

rejected.reason: Still blocked on real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying and current live-origin/routing evidence; no fabricated launch evidence used.
The latest game loop is already saturated through Session 41 mobile GM decision work. This audit's live broken premises are infrastructure/tooling truth gaps that affect every future arc.
